items.title: Sets and maps: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Sets and maps are interchangeable because both usually offer fast lookup and use braces in some languages.

feedback.correct: Correct. Choose a set for membership of unique values and a map when each unique key must retrieve an associated value; state order needs separately.
